Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 11}The clock at the entrance can be used to fully restore HP and SP {f 0 1 2}for your entire team{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can also find clocks on the floors you're currently exploring. They will also provide the same effect as the clock at the entrance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Activating a clock requires {f 0 1 2}seven Twilight Fragments{f 0 1 27}, so you should make a habit of collecting them for emergencies.[n]{f 1 1}
